## What & why


## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated; `dotnet test src/Spek.slnx` (or `./scripts/ci.sh`) is green
- [ ] Docs updated for any user-visible change; `dotnet test --filter DocSnippet` passes
- [ ] New compile-time rules have a `CE####` + an entry in `docs/reference/errors.md`
- [ ] No forward-looking content added to the docs (planned work belongs in a GitHub issue)
- [ ] Follows "C# idioms first, Spek sugar later"
